heading: Authorization of appropriations; availability
label: 4127 Authorization of appropriations; availability
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsecs. (a) and (c), was in the original a reference to “this title” meaning title XIII of , , , known as the National Flood Insurance Act of 1968, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 90–44882 Stat. 572section 4001 of this titleAug. 1, 1968

Amendments2004—Subsec. (c). substituted “through the date specified in , for studies under this chapter.” for “through the date specified in , for studies under this chapter. Any amount appropriated under this subsection shall remain available until expended.”Pub. L. 108–264section 4026 of this titlesection 4026 of this titlemade amendment identical to that made by . (c). substituted “” for “”.Pub. L. 106–377December 31, 2001September 30, 20001999—Subsec. (c). substituted “2000” for “1999”.Pub. L. 106–741998—Subsec. (c). substituted “1999” for “1998”.Pub. L. 105–2761997—Subsec. (c). substituted “such sums as may be necessary through , for studies under this chapter” for “for studies under this chapter not to exceed $36,283,000 for fiscal year 1990, and such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 1991”.Pub. L. 105–65September 30, 19981996—Subsec. (c). , which directed amendment of first sentence by substituting “such sums as may be necessary through for studies under this chapter.” for “this subsection” and all that follows, could not be executed because phrase “this subsection” does not appear in first sentence.Pub. L. 104–204September 30, 19971989—Subsec. (c). substituted provisions authorizing appropriations of not to exceed $36,283,000 for fiscal year 1990 and such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 1991 for provisions authorizing appropriations of $37,000,000 for fiscal year 1988, and $37,000,000 for fiscal year 1989.Pub. L. 101–1371988—Subsec. (c). amended subsec. (c) generally. Prior to amendment, subsec. (c) read as follows: “There are authorized to be appropriated for studies under this chapter not to exceed $100,000,000 for the fiscal year 1977, not to exceed $108,000,000 for the fiscal year 1978, not to exceed $114,000,000 for the fiscal year 1979, not to exceed $74,000,000 for the fiscal year 1980, not to exceed $61,600,000 for the fiscal year 1981, not to exceed $42,600,000 for the fiscal year 1982, not to exceed $49,752,000 for the fiscal year 1984, and such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 1985.”Pub. L. 100–2421983—Subsec. (c). inserted “not to exceed $49,752,000 for the fiscal year 1984, and such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 1985”.Pub. L. 98–1811981—Subsec. (c). authorized appropriation of not to exceed $42,600,000 for fiscal year 1982.Pub. L. 97–351980—Subsec. (c). authorized appropriation of not to exceed $61,600,000 for fiscal year 1981.Pub. L. 96–3991979—Subsec. (c). authorized appropriation of $74,000,000 for fiscal year 1980.Pub. L. 96–1531978—Subsec. (c). substituted “not to exceed $108,000,000 for the fiscal year 1978, and not to exceed $114,000,000 for the fiscal year 1979” for “and not to exceed $108,000,000 for the fiscal year 1978”.Pub. L. 95–5571977—Subsec. (c). authorized appropriation of $108,000,000 for fiscal year 1978.Pub. L. 95–1281976—Subsec. (c). added subsec. (c).Pub. L. 94–375

children.text: to cover administrative expenses authorized under ;section 4126 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: premium equalization payments under which have been made from such fund; andsection 4054 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: reinsurance claims paid under the excess loss reinsurance coverage provided under ; andsection 4055 of this title
to make such other payments as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this chapter.

children.label: b
children.text: All such funds shall be available without fiscal year limitation.

children.label: c
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary through the date specified in , for studies under this chapter.section 4026 of this title
